title: 3D Items
description: Replaces Random Item Models with 3D Items
body:
This Texture Pack adds Random Items I've replaced with 3D Models (Check Gallery For Images)
![Armor and Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/741a92fede39ba30207644b9470bd6fe5f560810.png)![Random Items 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1a830479e365603644ac58cc15a9a99a246a767.png)![Random Items 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26d586d225228b4a6bdca289d86952887d8addcb.png)![Doors and Candles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/863d4f986872b06608eb588c201132a47b1d4f11.png)![Ocean Plants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6fa30ba25518594d1c91c18e9f6de42d2129ed5.png)![Vehicles and Signs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/796a7749dad6c58811e548ca4eb99a945c47f2d0.png)![Plants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a405ca955254905d886b75935acf49af447e2acc.png)![Items Changed in 1.3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51993fadf518797e78410913af080b4997c75de6.png)
